description: STUB — reserved schema code for Phase G2 (Path Routing Rules). Defines an evaluable rule that maps a complaint's (category, subcategoryL1?) onto a routing path (e.g. IGE | IGSAE in the BRD example, or any tenant-defined path token used by CRS.CategorySLA). The actual rule shape (priority ordering, requiresManualTriage flag, override fields) is intentionally NOT defined here — the design lives in docs/g-phases/g2-path-routing-rules.md and the schema definition will be filled in by the implementation PR. This stub exists only to reserve the schema code so future references in the configurator UI, the pgr-services routing hook, and the open-questions/audit design stay stable across the design and implementation PRs.

definition.title: CRS Path Routing Rule (STUB — design only)

description: STUB — reserved schema code for Phase G2 (Path Routing Rules). Singleton-shaped record per tenant that holds the fallback routing decision for complaints where no CRS.PathRoutingRule matches (notably the BRD's per-category "Other" free-text option). The actual shape (defaultPath, defaultRequiresTriage, etc.) is intentionally NOT defined here — see docs/g-phases/g2-path-routing-rules.md. This stub exists only to reserve the schema code.

definition.title: CRS Path Routing Default (STUB — design only)
